zh.lifeSummary: 當Jehan de Rollancourt於1108年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯洛藍古特時，他的父親Hugues II de Rollancourt36歲，母親Jeanne de Blingel26歲。他於1136年與Marie Catherine de Crequy在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯克雷基結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1160年在他的家鄉享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jehan de Rollancourt于1108年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯洛藍古特时，他的父亲Hugues II de Rollancourt36岁，母亲Jeanne de Blingel26岁。他于1136年与Marie Catherine de Crequy在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯克雷基结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1160年在他的家乡享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jehan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Older Scottish spelling of Joan , which was traditionally pronounced as two syllables.

variants.name: Jan
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

variants.name: Jon
meanings: Simplified spelling of   John   or a short form of   Jonathan .  The name is borne by the Canadian singer  Jon Vickers  (  b. 1926 ) and the American actor  Jon Voight  (  b. 1938 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Jehan de Rollancourt was born in 1108, in Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, his father, Hugues II de Rollancourt, was 36 and his mother, Jeanne de Blingel, was 26. He married Marie Catherine de Crequy in 1136, in Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1160, in his hometown, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jehan de Rollancourt est né en 1108, à Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Hugues II de Rollancourt, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de Blingel, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Marie Catherine de Crequy en 1136, à Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1160, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jehan de Rollancourt 1108 in Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugues II de Rollancourt 36 und seine Mutter Jeanne de Blingel 26. Er hat 1136 in Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich Marie Catherine de Crequy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1160 im Alter von 52 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jehan de Rollancourt è nato il nel 1108 nel Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, il suo padre, Hugues II de Rollancourt, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Jeanne de Blingel, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Marie Catherine de Crequy nel 1136, nel Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1160, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jehan de Rollancourtが1108年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスロランコウルトで生まれた時，父Hugues II de Rollancourtは36歳，母Jeanne de Blingelは26歳であった。1136年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスクルeクイでMarie Catherine de Crequyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1160年に故郷で52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jehan de Rollancourt(이)가 1108년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 롤랭쿠르트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugues II de Rollancourt(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Jeanne de Blingel(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1136년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 크e크이에서 Marie Catherine de Crequy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1160년 그의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jehan de Rollancourt nasceu em 1108, em Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Hugues II de Rollancourt, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de Blingel, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Marie Catherine de Crequy em 1136, em Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1160, em sua cidade natal, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jehan de Rollancourt родился в 1108 г. в местности ролланкоурт, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, его отцу по имени Hugues II de Rollancourt было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de Blingel, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Marie Catherine de Crequy в 1136 г. в местности крeкуи, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1160 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jehan de Rollancourt nació en 1108, en Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Hugues II de Rollancourt, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Jeanne de Blingel, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Marie Catherine de Crequy en 1136, en Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1160, en su pueblo, a la edad de 52 años.
